Another great painter, Henry Matisee (13). has Venus in friendly
Aquarius in the Rasi and in friendly SCorpio in the Navamsa. He took up
painting at 20 while recovering from an illness and exhibited his fii'St

became a. pubic sensation with his new insight into color and his new

high Intensity. He also did some sculpture.
